degraded: External code review (external_review.py — GPT-5.4 + Gemini 3.1 Pro): both returned ship-with-fixes; their shared HIGH finding (the redesign had dropped the spec-required open-standard anchor + per-dimension provenance from the card) was fixed by re-surfacing them inside the expandable <details> (spec satisfied, jargon off the face); their test-loosening findings fixed (exact anchor count, no anchors in dimension cards, set-equality href assertions).

Internal opus code review = NO blocking issues (security PASS, jargon-suppression CORRECT, honesty PASS). All 4 low advisories applied: removed a leftover duplicate _CTA_URL + stale 'single link' comment; added a guard test that every engine dimension has plain copy; reworded the report_copy docstring (backed_by cites external standards, not the dashboard); pinned the load-bearing honesty hedges with tests.

behaviors.behavior: Each dimension card teaches a non-expert: plain question + always-visible one-line 'what this checks' + expandable <details> 'why it matters' with a concrete everyday scenario
n/a dimensions are reframed jargon-free on the card face; the raw engine detail ('needs per-change behavior-impact (BP-2)') is suppressed there
measured dimensions surface their concrete finding under 'In your repo:'
The spec-required open-standard anchor + provenance (source/mode/freshness) are surfaced, but INSIDE the expandable (after <summary>), not on the plain face
Two-CTA funnel: Understand (the Masterclass) + Fix (/shipwright-adopt); 'certify' removed from the CTA; both links the trusted URL
Security preserved through the multi-link relaxation: exactly two anchors, ALL the trusted CTA; zero anchors inside dimension cards; hostile input yields zero extra links / zero fetch-or-script nodes

Marketing honesty is load-bearing: the enforced-mechanism hedges (traceability 'or explicitly classified', reconciliation 'flags…until…proven' not 'won't let through', test-health coverage-depth limit, size 'no unchecked growth') and full per-dimension copy coverage are pinned so a future over-claim fails CI
Determinism + escape-only intact after the copy overlay + DOM-builder extraction; HTML golden regenerated & byte-exact; modules ≤300 LOC; ruff clean
